basic_details.job_title: Puri District Court Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Junior Typist, Junior Clerk cum Copyist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Typist, Junior Clerk cum-Copyist and More
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for women and reserved categories as per provisions of the Act, Rules, Orders or Instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma, Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board, Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E.
qualification.details: Junior Typist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in Typewriting through computer system. Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: +3 examination or equivalent from recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute. Salaried Amin: Matriculation or equivalent from recognized Board; Revenue Inspector Training from recognized institute. General Qualification: Passed test in Oriya equivalent to M.E. Standard.

salary_details.junior typist: Rs.19,900/- - 63,200/- under Level-4 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)
salary_details.junior clerk-cum-copyist: Rs.19,900/- - 63,200/- under Level-4 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)
salary_details.salaried amin: Rs.21,700/- - 69,100/- under Level-5 of the Pay Matrix (O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017)

selection_process: Written Test Type Writing Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Puri District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https:// puri.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Puri District Court Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Puri District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Puri District Court Recruitment 2026 is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by Puri District Court?
faq.answer: Puri District Court has announced a total of 16 vacancies for various posts, including Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, and Salaried Amin.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories and women as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Puri District Court Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post, candidates must have completed a +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university and possess a Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Puri District Court Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, Type Writing Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), and a Viva-Voce Test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist post is Rs.19,900/- to Rs.63,200/- per month, falling under Level-4 of the Pay Matrix as per O.R.S.P. Rules, 2017.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Puri District Court Recruitment 2026 is Offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Does the notification mention any specific qualification for Oriya language?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have passed a test in Oriya equivalent to the M.E. Standard as a general qualification for these posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Puri District Court, which is https://puri.dcourts.gov.in.
